languages.text: "На кону не только моя жизнь, но и жизни всех вас. Я выслушаю тех, кому есть, что сказать". {n}Линза оптического импланта с тихим жужжанием фокусируется на Ларии.{/n} "Первой будет говорить сенешаль".
languages.translation_comment: Если играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead или DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead, DL_KamilleArrestedOrDead за каждый из них DL_LariaPlan_counter +1

traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.translation_comment: Если играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead или DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead, DL_KamilleArrestedOrDead за каждый из них DL_LariaPlan_counter +1

languages.text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."
languages.original_text: "На кону не только моя жизнь, но и жизни всех вас. Я выслушаю тех, кому есть, что сказать". {n}Линза оптического импланта с тихим жужжанием фокусируется на Ларии.{/n} "Первой будет говорить сенешаль".

traits.locale_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

"My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

"My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

languages.text: “在此危局之中，不仅我的性命攸关，你们也同样如此。我将倾听每一个愿意发言之人。”{n}伴随着轻微的机械嗡鸣，他的光学植入物镜片对准了菈丽雅。{/n}“请总领先发言。”
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

traits.locale_text: “在此危局之中，不仅我的性命攸关，你们也同样如此。我将倾听每一个愿意发言之人。”{n}伴随着轻微的机械嗡鸣，他的光学植入物镜片对准了菈丽雅。{/n}“请总领先发言。”

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas le seul à risquer ma vie ici, c'est notre cas à tous. J'écouterai quiconque a quelque chose à dire. » {n}Dans un vrombissement discret, la lentille de son implant oculaire se fixe sur Laria.{/n} « La sénéchale sera la première à s'exprimer. »
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas le seul à risquer ma vie ici, c'est notre cas à tous. J'écouterai quiconque a quelque chose à dire. » {n}Dans un vrombissement discret, la lentille de son implant oculaire se fixe sur Laria.{/n} « La sénéchale sera la première à s'exprimer. »

languages.text: «Mi vida no es la única en juego aquí, las suyas también lo están. Escucharé a cualquiera que tenga algo que decir». {n}Con un ligero zumbido, la lente de su implante óptico se centra en Laria.{/n} «La Senescal tiene la primera palabra».
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

traits.locale_text: «Mi vida no es la única en juego aquí, las suyas también lo están. Escucharé a cualquiera que tenga algo que decir». {n}Con un ligero zumbido, la lente de su implante óptico se centra en Laria.{/n} «La Senescal tiene la primera palabra».

languages.text: "Burada tehlikede olan sadece benim hayatım değil, hepinizinki tehlikede. Söyleyecek bir şeyi olan herkesi dinleyeceğim." {n}Optik implantının merceği, sessiz bir vızıltıyla Laria'ya odaklanıyor.{/n} "İlk söz Seneşal'in."
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

traits.locale_text: "Burada tehlikede olan sadece benim hayatım değil, hepinizinki tehlikede. Söyleyecek bir şeyi olan herkesi dinleyeceğim." {n}Optik implantının merceği, sessiz bir vızıltıyla Laria'ya odaklanıyor.{/n} "İlk söz Seneşal'in."

languages.text: "Es steht nicht nur mein, sondern Euer aller Leben auf dem Spiel. Ich werde jeden anhören, der etwas zu sagen hat." {n}Mit einem leisen Summen richtet sich sein optisches Implantat auf Laria.{/n} "Die Truchsessin wird als Erste sprechen."
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."

traits.locale_text: "Es steht nicht nur mein, sondern Euer aller Leben auf dem Spiel. Ich werde jeden anhören, der etwas zu sagen hat." {n}Mit einem leisen Summen richtet sich sein optisches Implantat auf Laria.{/n} "Die Truchsessin wird als Erste sprechen."

languages.text: 「ここで命をかけたのは私だけではありません。皆さんの命もです。何か言いたい人は誰でも聞いてあげます。」{n}静かに回転するレンズがリアを捉える。{/n}「まずは執事から話してもらおう。」
languages.original_text: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."
